cells.rationale: Branch-aware transcript reduction introduces a public JSON contract with subtle correctness invariants around ancestry, completion, truncation, and failure semantics.
OAuth isolation, secret safety, concurrent stale-result prevention, and fail-open cross-module title propagation make this security- and correctness-critical work.
